title: Encumbering Stone
description: A mod that adds the Encumbering Stone from Terraria
body:
# Encumbering Stone
Adds in an Encumbering Stone from Terraria.

## What it does
- Disables pick-ups while it's active
- Right click it inside your inventory to enable.

## FAQ
- Can you update it to 1.2X?
If I feel like it, sure
- Forge port?
Use [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), I know it works.
